summary: Framework extension for OS compatibility testing with hybrid detection, command adapter layer, and YAML-driven scenario abstraction
approach: Implement OS detection registry with command adapter pattern. Task 1 creates the core OS detection and registry framework. Task 2 implements the command adapter layer with YAML configuration integration and built-in domestic OS support.

design_decisions.decision: OS registry stored in YAML with fallback to dynamic detection
design_decisions.rationale: Locked constraint: config primary, dynamic secondary

design_decisions.decision: Command adapter uses pluggable registry pattern
design_decisions.rationale: Locked constraint: command adapter registration mechanism
Locked constraint: scenario layer abstraction via YAML/JSON
